Name: Business Checking - Umpqua Bank
Description: Primary operating checking account for Meade & Sons Construction

Name: Business Savings - Umpqua Bank
Description: Reserve savings account for tax and emergency expenses

Name: Accounts Receivable
Description: Outstanding invoices owed by construction clients

Name: Construction Revenue
Description: Revenue from all construction projects - remodels, decks, roofing, ADU builds

Name: Cost of Goods Sold - Materials
Description: Lumber, roofing materials, concrete, hardware, and other job-site materials

Name: Cost of Goods Sold - Subcontractors
Description: Payments to plumbing, electrical, concrete, and other subcontractors

Name: Accounts Payable
Description: Outstanding bills to vendors and subcontractors

Name: Tools & Equipment
Description: Purchase and rental of tools and equipment for job sites

Name: Vehicle & Fuel
Description: Truck fuel, maintenance, and vehicle-related expenses

Name: Insurance - General Liability
Description: Annual general liability and workers comp insurance premiums

Name: Permits & Licenses
Description: City and county building permits, contractor license fees

Name: Retained Earnings
Description: Accumulated net income retained in Meade & Sons Construction
